records.question: Which customers named Cecelia with email caesar.lemke@example.net, phone 672-559-0630x7875, living at 4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103, using Direct Debit, and customer number 429 had an address starting on 2009-05-22 04:42:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'caesar.lemke@example.net' AND customers.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2009-05-22 04:42:28' AND customers.customer_name = 'Cecelia' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customers.customer_address = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103' AND customers.customer_number = '429'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE c.customer_name = 'Cecelia'
  AND c.customer_email = 'caesar.lemke@example.net'
  AND c.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875'
  AND c.customer_address = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103'
  AND c.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
  AND c.customer_number = '429'
  AND cah.date_from = '2009-05-22 04:42:28'

records.question: Which customers named Cheyenne use Direct Debit as their payment method?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Cheyenne' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
records.pred_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE customer_name = 'Cheyenne' AND payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'

records.question: Which customers living at 058 Ben Street Apt. 034 have completed orders?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Completed' AND customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
WHERE a.line_1_number_building = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034'
  AND co.order_status_code = 'completed'

records.question: Which customers had an address ending exactly on 2018-03-19 10:10:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
WHERE customer_address_history.date_to = '2018-03-19 10:10:53'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT customer_id
FROM Customer_Address_History
WHERE date_to = '2018-03-19 10:10:53'

records.question: Who are the customers with addresses located exactly in Gleasonland, Kentucky?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_address_history.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Kentucky' AND addresses.city = 'Gleasonland'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE a.city = 'Gleasonland' AND a.state_province_county = 'Kentucky'

records.question: Who are the customers with customer_number 838 and address 058 Ben Street Apt. 034, whose phone is 009-136-4509x19635, payment method is Direct Debit, who placed completed orders on or before 1979-03-29 02:47:13, and whose address history spans from 2013-06-14 23:07:04 to at least 2018-03-16 14:49:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635' AND customer_orders.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Completed' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customer_address_history.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28' AND customers.customer_number = '838' AND customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
JOIN Addresses a ON cah.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_number = '838'
  AND a.line_1_number_building = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034'
  AND c.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635'
  AND c.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
  AND co.order_status_code = 'completed'
  AND co.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13'
  AND cah.date_from <= '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
  AND (cah.date_to IS NULL OR cah.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28')

records.question: Which customers named Cleo with customer number 795 use Credit Card as their payment method and have placed orders on or after 2002-01-20 01:52:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_date >= '2002-01-20 01:52:53' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' AND customers.customer_name = 'Cleo' AND customers.customer_number = '795'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_name = 'Cleo'
  AND c.customer_number = '795'
  AND c.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card'
  AND o.order_date >= '2002-01-20 01:52:53'

records.question: Which customers named Lela with the email vandervort.helena@example.org had a partial order and an address starting exactly on 2010-03-25 08:23:20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_address_history.date_from = '2010-03-25 08:23:20' AND customers.customer_email = 'vandervort.helena@example.org' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Part' AND customers.customer_name = 'Lela'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
JOIN Order_Items oi ON co.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_name = 'Lela'
  AND c.customer_email = 'vandervort.helena@example.org'
  AND co.order_status_code = 'partial'
  AND cah.date_from = '2010-03-25 08:23:20'
